message:
fix(wal): clean up temp file on I/O error and add Drop impl for ParallelWalCoordinator

persist_wal_fec_raptorq_repair_symbols leaked a .wal-fec.tmp file when
write_all, io::copy, or flush failed — the early `?` return skipped
fs::remove_file. Wrap the I/O operations in a closure so the temp file
is always removed on error before propagating.

ParallelWalCoordinator::start() spawns a wal-epoch-ticker thread, but
dropping the coordinator without calling stop() left the thread running
forever. Add a Drop impl that calls stop() to join the ticker thread.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
